ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
ayat.english: The hour drew nigh and the moon was rent in twain.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayat.english: And if they behold a portent they turn away and say: Prolonged illusion.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayat.english: They denied (the Truth) and followed their own lusts. Yet everything will come to a decision

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayat.english: And surely there hath come unto them news whereof the purport should deter,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayat.english: Effective wisdom; but warnings avail not.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayat.english: So withdraw from them (O Muhammad) on the day when the Summoner summoneth unto a painful thing.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayat.english: With downcast eyes, they come forth from the graves as they were locusts spread abroad,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayat.english: Hastening toward the summoner; the disbelievers say: This is a hard day.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayat.english: The folk of Noah denied before them, yea, they denied Our slave and said: A madman; and he was repulsed.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayat.english: So he cried unto his Lord, saying: I am vanquished, so give help.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
ayat.english: Then opened We the gates of heaven with pouring water

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayat.english: And caused the earth to gush forth springs, so that the waters met for a predestined purpose.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
ayat.english: And We carried him upon a thing of planks and nails,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayat.english: That ran (upon the waters) in Our sight, as a reward for him who was rejected.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And verily We left it as a token; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: Then see how (dreadful) was My punishment after My warnings!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And in truth We have made the Qur'an easy to remember; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: (The tribe of) A'ad rejected warnings. Then how (dreadful) was My punishment after My warnings.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayat.english: Lo! We let loose on them a raging wind on a day of constant calamity,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayat.english: Sweeping men away as though they were uprooted trunks of palm-trees.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: Then see how (dreadful) was My punishment after My warnings!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And in truth We have made the Qur'an easy to remember; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayat.english: (The tribe of) Thamud rejected warnings

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayat.english: For they said; Is it a mortal man, alone among us, that we are to follow? Then indeed we should fall into error and madness.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayat.english: Hath the remembrance been given unto him alone among us? Nay, but he is a rash liar.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayat.english: (Unto their warner it was said): To-morrow they will know who is the rash liar.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayat.english: Lo! We are sending the she-camel as a test for them; so watch them and have patience;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayat.english: And inform them that the water is to be shared between (her and) them. Every drinking will be witnessed.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
ayat.english: But they call their comrade and he took and hamstrung (her).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: Then see how (dreadful) was My punishment after My warnings!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayat.english: Lo! We sent upon them one Shout, and they became as the dry twigs (rejected by) the builder of a cattle-fold.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And in truth We have made the Qur'an easy to remember; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayat.english: The folk of Lot rejected warnings.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayat.english: Lo! We sent a storm of stones upon them (all) save the family of Lot, whom We rescued in the last watch of the night,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayat.english: As grace from Us. Thus We reward him who giveth thanks.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayat.english: And he indeed had warned them of Our blow, but they did doubt the warnings.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: They even asked of him his guests for an ill purpose. Then We blinded their eyes (and said): Taste now My punishment after My warnings!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayat.english: And in truth the punishment decreed befell them early in the morning.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayat.english: Now taste My punishment after My warnings!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And in truth We have made the Qur'an easy to remember; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayat.english: And warnings came in truth unto the house of Pharaoh

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayat.english: Who denied Our revelations, every one. Therefore We grasped them with the grasp of the Mighty, the Powerful.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayat.english: Are your disbelievers better than those, or have ye some immunity in the scriptures?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayat.english: Or say they: We are a host victorious?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
ayat.english: The hosts will all be routed and will turn and flee.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayat.english: Nay, but the Hour (of doom) is their appointed tryst, and the Hour will be more wretched and more bitter (than their earthly failure).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayat.english: Lo! the guilty are in error and madness.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayat.english: On the day when they are dragged into the Fire upon their faces (it is said unto them): Feel the touch of hell.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayat.english: Lo! We have created every thing by measure.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayat.english: And Our commandment is but one (commandment), as the twinkling of an eye.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayat.english: And verily We have destroyed your fellows; but is there any that remembereth?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayat.english: And every thing they did is in the scriptures,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayat.english: And every small and great thing is recorded.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
ayat.english: Lo! the righteous will dwell among gardens and rivers,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayat.english: Firmly established in the favour of a Mighty King.
